Welcome to the On-Demand Meeting Portal for the
Town of Fishkill, New York
; your source for meeting agendas, detailed agenda packets, minutes, and videos.
Agendas and minutes will open as PDF files when you select their links by meeting date.  Clicking on the meeting date will bring you to an outline view for that meeting that will also contain the links to those same PDF files as well as links to PDF files of individual meeting documents and attachments.
